title: Source Contribution Graph
description: A minimized graph structure describing relationships between sources and answer components in AI-mediated search.

schema_version.description: The schema version of this Source Contribution Graph.

graph_id.description: A non-reversible identifier for this contribution graph.

graph_type.description: The broad type of contribution graph.

node_id.description: A local identifier for this graph node.

node_type.description: The type of node represented in the graph.

source_fingerprint.description: Optional non-reversible source fingerprint for source nodes.

source_class_code.description: Optional source class code for source nodes.

component_type.description: Optional answer component type for answer component nodes.

component_digest.description: Optional digest of an answer component. Raw answer text must not be stored here.

edges.description: Edges describing contribution relationships between graph nodes.

from_node.description: The source node ID for this edge.

to_node.description: The target node ID for this edge.

relation_type.description: The type of contribution relationship between nodes.

contribution_signal.description: A broad contribution signal. This is not a royalty weight, payment score, or legal attribution score.

evidence_mode.description: The evidence basis for this contribution edge.

graph_policy.description: Boundary policy for the contribution graph.

raw_content_stored.description: Must be false. Raw source content must not be stored inside the contribution graph.

raw_query_stored.description: Must be false. Raw user queries must not be stored inside the contribution graph.

raw_answer_stored.description: Must be false. Raw AI answers must not be stored inside the contribution graph.

royalty_decision_included.description: Must be false. Royalty decisions are outside the scope of v0.3.

legal_attribution_included.description: Must be false. Legal attribution decisions are outside the scope of v0.3.

integrity.description: Optional integrity metadata for verifying the contribution graph.

previous_graph_hash.description: Optional hash of a previous contribution graph for chained integrity.
